productDisplayName: Spalding Men's Navy With Yellow Flip Flop
description: CompositionNavy blue and yellow slippers with rubber insole and graphic, EVA midsole and TPR outsole, double layer strap with embroidered logo and twill tape toe separatorsshoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnjoy summer in these sleek navy blue flip flops from spalding. The Basketball inspired graphic on the insole is the very essence of the brand. The blue insole is soft and the yellow EVA midsole makes the footwear lightweight and cushioned. The wide straps ensure a snug Fit and the twill tape toe separators give added comfort. The TPR outsole with the elevated ridges enhance grip and stability.
